titleStmt.title: SII 11.69: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 69. (B.K. No. 23 of 1927-28). RĀJŪR, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A STONE LEANING AGAINST THE FRONT WALL OF THE TEMPLE OF HANUMĀN.

summary.p: The inscription belongs to the reign of Jagadēkamalladēva I who was ruling from his capital at Kalyāṇapura. It records that, while Prabhu Jōga was administering Rājuru included in Kisukāḍu Seventy, the image of the god Jōgēśvara was installed at Rājūru on Monday, Vaiśākha, śu, puṇṇame of the year Śrīmukha falling in Śaka 45869 (!) and that several gifts of land and money were made to the temples of Jōgēśvara, Gavaṟēśvara and Sōmanātha. The Śaka year is given wrongly. Otherwise the details would regularly correspond to Monday, 16th April, A.D. 1033 (Śaka 955). The characters are too late to be assigned to the time of Jagadēkamalla I. But in Jagadekamalla II's reign there was no cyclic year Śrīmukha. The record is probably a copy. It is worded very indifferently.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṅgaśirastuṅgacaṁdracāmaracauravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁ
bhayā saṁbhuvē . namaḥ śivāya © © © gaṇanatha .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpithvīvallabhaṁ mahā
rājādhirājanuṁ paramēsvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāsṛ
yakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrījagadēkamalladēva
ra viceyarājyā muttharōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamana
caṁdṛrkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadma mō
pajīviga ḷu � kalyāṇapurada nelavīḍiniṁ sukhasaṁkathavinōdadiṁdire .
śrī kalidēvarācari caṁdṛbhūśaṇadēvaru paḍeda dhārapūrvvaka
kāvaṁ saraṇene bhītiyi nīvaṁ vaṁdijanada yiṣṭama mattaṁ
yēvanu yaṁbarī nṟipanaṁ kāvava nāva Ācanṟipanameniyise ba
duṁkuvannaru moḷarē . tṟiṇavaṁ kaccalu kāduṁ raṇedalu mā
ṟaṁta nṟipara gelduṁ triṇe(ṁ)yanaṁ gatibhaktaṁ guṇanidhi Ācanṟipa mū
rjitatējaṁ . tatpadōpajīvi . Ā gaḷu vaṁdijanavaṁ rāgadiyavarka
vanene tyāgada kaṇi gārdore jōgaṁgeṁdu pogaḷguṁ bhūmaṁḍaḷaṁ Anūna
yadiṁdaṁ . saṁtōsada pṛbhu jogaṁ Anaṁntakalasukhadaliddha matthaṁ bhṛ
tivaidaparamana Aciṁtyana śupṛtiyiṣṭemāḍālu dyaktane
māḍaṁ . va . Aṁntu kuṁntaḷa madhyapradēsado ḷeseva ra
maṇīyavenisida kisūkāḍerppattaṟoḷu Atisayavenisi dāgara
rājuralli śukhasaṁkhathā(ḥ) vinōdadiṁdire . sakhavarśada 45869 neya śrī
mukha saṁvachsarada vaiśākhaśuddha puṁṇnami sōmavaradaṁdu vuttarāyaṇa
saṁkramahāḷada Abhijeya lagnadalu śrījōgēśvara dēvara supra
tiṣṭhitamāytu Atiṣaya vettēṁ . karasi Ayinūrbari
ge vistaradiṁ biḷeyama nittu paramapṛbhu manōha
ramūrtige śrīgavaṟēśvaradēvareṁndarale caṁdṟārkavaraṁ . Aṁntu
taṁmma kulasvami śrīgavaṟēśvaradēvargge rājūraṁ A
ṟuvatthokkalu mukhyavāgi jōgagavuṁḍaṁ dēvara Aṅgabhōgajī
rnōdharake koṭṭa vṟiti jaṇabana keṟeĪṁ teṁka mattharu 4 chatṛseya vuṁca
geṟeya dāriṁ baḍagalu gramēsvaradēvara keĪyiṁ teṅka ma
tdaru voṁdu 1 Āīnūrvvaru mukhyavāgi Āstaḷada gavaṟegaṁḍaruṁ
muṁmuridaṁḍaṅgaḷuṁ koṭṭa dhrarṁmma caitra pavitradali vokkali
ge hāga voṭṭalu goḷaga hanage māna matta soṁṭige yaṁṇne hoṁ
gge davasavikreyakke Arevīsa maneya nēvesaṇa mūḍa sō
manathadēvara gaddheyiṁ paḍuva teṁkamukhavāgi baṁda kai 48 teṁkapaḍuva mukhavāgi baṁdamēre
karaḍiya malayana maṁṭhediṁ baḍaga kai 34 paḍuva mūligavaneya heddāri mūḍa baḍaga
mukha baṁda kai 48 baḍaga kṣētrapāḷa mēre muḍamukhavāgi baṁda kai 34 A nivēsaṇadalli
gāṇa voṁdu 1 sāsirvvaruṁ mūnūrvvaruṁ koṭṭa Eleya heṟēṁge vīsa 1
© śrī sōmanāthadēvariṁge tōṁṭa vuṁcageṟeyā dāriṁ baḍaga ma
ttharu 2 gaddhe kalidēvara gaddeyiṁ taṁka nīṟuvagaliṁ paḍuva katthalēsvaradiṁ baḍaga
lu sōmānathadēvariṁ mūḍa kaṁma 450 sāsirvvaruṁ mūnūrvvaruṁ koṭṭa Eleya
hēṟiṁge vīsa Ā tōṁṭake suṁkā paṁnnāya sa(ṁ)mastavuṁ maṁnnaṇe .
Digital edition of SII 11.69 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
